name: openclaw-hooks-bundle
description: 一套高质量的 OpenClaw Hooks，提升代码质量、安全性和开发体验

scripts.test: npm --prefix plugins/openclaw-quality-hooks test && npm --prefix plugins/context-mode test
scripts.coverage: node --experimental-strip-types --experimental-test-coverage --test --test-coverage-lines=80 --test-coverage-functions=80 --test-coverage-branches=80 --test-coverage-include='plugins/**/*.ts' --test-coverage-exclude='**/test/**' plugins/openclaw-quality-hooks/test/*.test.ts plugins/context-mode/test/*.test.ts && npm --prefix plugins/context-mode run smoke
scripts.lint: npm --prefix plugins/openclaw-quality-hooks run lint && npm --prefix plugins/context-mode run lint
scripts.check: npm run coverage && npm run lint

author: Your Name
